projects.title: AI Agent Civilization
projects.shortDescription: Age of Empires style visualization of AI agents building and strategizing in real-time.
projects.description: An experimental 2D/3D visualization that renders AI agents as civilizations building, gathering resources, and executing strategies. Watch autonomous agents make decisions, form alliances, and compete for dominance in a procedurally generated world.

projects.title: Neon Brickbreaker
projects.shortDescription: Classic arcade action reimagined with a cyberpunk aesthetic.
projects.description: A polished take on the classic Brickbreaker game featuring neon visuals, powerups, and progressive difficulty. Built with vanilla JavaScript and Canvas API for maximum performance.

projects.title: Reflekt
projects.shortDescription: A minimalist journaling app with mood tracking and insights.
projects.description: Personal journaling application with encrypted local storage, mood pattern analysis, and weekly insights. Designed to encourage consistent reflection without the friction of traditional apps.

projects.title: The Oasis
projects.shortDescription: Original Three.js metaverse experiment with animated avatar.
projects.description: The original personal metaverse experience featuring an animated 3D avatar, interactive camera controls, and atmospheric effects. A proof of concept for immersive web-based 3D environments.

projects.title: Shader Gallery
projects.shortDescription: Collection of GLSL shaders and visual experiments.
projects.description: An interactive gallery showcasing custom GLSL fragment shaders. From plasma effects to ray marching, explore the mathematics behind procedural graphics.

projects.title: Focus Timer
projects.shortDescription: Minimal pomodoro timer with ambient soundscapes.
projects.description: A distraction-free focus timer implementing the Pomodoro Technique. Features customizable work/break intervals, ambient background sounds, and session statistics.

projects.title: Neon Snake
projects.shortDescription: The classic snake game with modern visuals and mechanics.
projects.description: A reimagined version of the classic Snake game featuring glowing neon aesthetics, smooth animations, and additional game modes including endless and timed challenges.

projects.title: Inkwell
projects.shortDescription: Distraction-free markdown editor with live preview.
projects.description: A clean, focused writing environment with real-time markdown rendering, syntax highlighting, and export to multiple formats. Designed for writers who value simplicity.

projects.title: Particle Forge
projects.shortDescription: Interactive particle system with physics simulation.
projects.description: Create and manipulate particle systems in real-time. Experiment with forces, attractors, emitters, and color palettes to generate mesmerizing visual effects.

projects.title: Block Drop
projects.shortDescription: Tetris clone with modern visuals and ghost piece preview.
projects.description: A faithful recreation of the classic puzzle game with quality-of-life improvements including ghost piece preview, hold functionality, and T-spin detection.
